positive: Minimalist geometric forest of ethereal glowing crystals and stylized fauna, perfect for t-shirt print. A single, central, stylized moonpetal flower floats amongst the crystalline foliage. Strong silhouette against a gradient pastel background of lavender and mint green. High contrast line art feel with soft glow effect, intricate vector style, clean lines, centered composition, kawaii aesthetic, high detail, symmetrical composition.
negative: blurry, noisy, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, low quality, ugly, poor anatomy, extra limbs, jpeg artifacts
